system.description: When talking to someone, flatten your expression and roll [quality].

outcomes.success:
you can easily make a
target who has seen you before believe
you’ve never met, or make a target
who has never seen you before believe
you’ve met, and be able to describe
the place. As long as it’s a reasonable
place to have met one another,
they’ll believe it, even if it implies you
have a specific title, vocation, or life
experience that you don’t have.
outcomes.every3rd3:
choose one:
  • The person easily believes you’ve met an additional time, increasing their confidence and/or embarrassment.
  • The person won’t remember meeting you this time.
  • After your conversation, the person will vividly remember your face and voice differently. You decide what they remember, but if you choose somebody they know they will likely become a Loose End.
outcomes.failure:
you accidentally
take on their face. They see it
clearly. You cannot remove this
face until you succeed at this
ability with another target.
